title: Welcome to Static CMS
excerpt: A powerful, secure, and modern static site CMS
content:
# Welcome to Static CMS

This is your first post. Edit or delete it, then start writing!

## Features

- **Secure**: All API keys stored securely in Cloudflare Workers
- **Fast**: Static site generation with GitHub Pages
- **Flexible**: Markdown support and custom themes
- **Media Management**: Backblaze B2 for file storage

Get started by creating your first post from the admin panel.
